case_title: LEASECOMM CORPORATION vs. KIM, JI YOUNG

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEASECOMM CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT KIM, JI YOUNG
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVL CASE CPVER SHEET FILED.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEASECOMM CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KIM, JI YOUNG $2,793.84 PRINCIPAL, $1,019.56 INTEREST, $94.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,907.40 ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION

PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION, WRIT MAY BE ISSUED ON 12/12/00.
